title: Mallow Hearts 225g Sweet Pouch
features: Our Fruity, Jelly & Gummy Sweets are all part of our huge Pick and Mix range!
Manufactured in the UK and filled in our Sweet Shop, each sweet is sealed to maintain freshness to your door!
We have a huge range of traditional sweets, old fashioned sweets, retro sweets and pick and mix sweet boxes, sweet jars and other sweet gifts for you to enjoy or give as a gift.
description: Sweet lovers will love our Mallow Hearts, soft and squidgy.Ingredients For allergens please see ingredients listed in bold. Glucose-fructose syrup, sugar, water, pork gelatine, corn starch, flavouring, colour: E162. Giant Bradley's Online Sweet Shop has plenty of quality traditional sweets and retro sweets which are presented to you in a variety of sweet boxes, sweet jars and sweet hampers for you to enjoy.
